cards.name: Engineering Bay
cards.flavorText: The beating heart of the ship. Every bolt, every weld — a prayer to the void.

cards.name: Habitat Ring
cards.flavorText: Green corridors and simulated sunlight. Almost enough to forget where you are.

cards.name: Biosphere Sectors
cards.flavorText: Engineered wilderness. The trees don't know they're in a tin can.

cards.name: Weld-Rig Alpha

effects.description: Structures in this sector cost 1 less Matter.

decayConditions.description: Shuts down if energy drops below 2.

cards.flavorText: Every seam it closes opens a question: how long until the next one?

cards.name: Weld-Rig Wreckage
cards.flavorText: Useful parts, if you know where to look.

cards.name: Overclock Protocol

effects.description: Gain 3 Matter, but add 1 Hull Breach to your discard.

cards.flavorText: Push it past the red line. We'll deal with the consequences later.

cards.name: Hull Patching Crew

effects.description: Remove 1 Junk card from your hand or discard.

cards.flavorText: They work in silence. The hull speaks loud enough.

cards.name: Scrapyard Forge

effects.description: At the start of each turn, you may remove 1 Junk from your hand for free.

cards.flavorText: One ship's junk is another generation's salvation.

cards.name: Hydroponics Bay

effects.description: Gain +1 Influence at the start of each turn.

decayConditions.description: Withers without raw materials for nutrient cycling.

cards.flavorText: The roots remember soil, even if the children don't.

cards.name: Overgrown Ruin
cards.flavorText: Nature reclaims what it was never truly given.

cards.name: Community Gathering
cards.flavorText: In the sharing of bread, they share a future.

cards.name: Root Network

effects.description: Sowers cards in this sector gain +1 lifespan when played.

cards.flavorText: What connects us is deeper than steel.

cards.name: Supply Cache

effects.description: Cards you buy from the market cost 1 less Matter.

cards.flavorText: Ownership is a fiction. Possession is fact.

cards.name: Inventory Audit

effects.description: Draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Every gram accounted for. Every gram leveraged.

cards.name: Trade Embargo

effects.description: All market cards cost +2 of any resource next turn.
Gain 3 Data.

cards.flavorText: The Gilded don't close doors. They charge admission.

cards.name: Mission Archive

effects.description: Cards in this sector are protected from entropy decay effects.

cards.flavorText: The mission parameters have not changed. The crew has.

cards.name: Diagnostic Sweep

effects.description: Draw 2 cards, then discard 1.

cards.flavorText: Every anomaly catalogued. Every deviation noted.

cards.name: Compliance Directive

effects.description: Lock the rightmost market slot — its card cannot be bought or fall out.

decayConditions.description: Dissolved if The Flux gains sector dominance.

cards.flavorText: The directive was clear. The interpretation was not.

cards.name: Cascade Surge

effects.description: Slide the market 1 extra slot to the left.

cards.flavorText: Change is the only constant between the stars.

cards.name: Voltage Cult

effects.description: When any card falls out of the market, gain 1 Energy.

decayConditions.description: Disbands without Flux presence in the sector.

cards.flavorText: They worship the spark. The spark does not care.

cards.name: Revolutionary Tide

effects.description: Change the dominant faction of one sector to The Flux.
All players lose 2 Influence. Gain 2 Energy.

cards.flavorText: Every ship has a breaking point. The Flux calls it a beginning.

cards.name: Memory Vault

effects.description: Cards in this sector gain +1 lifespan.

cards.flavorText: Every face, every name. The Echoes forget nothing.

cards.name: Ancestral Rite

effects.description: Extend the lifespan of 1 card in your tableau by 2 cycles.

cards.flavorText: We carry them with us. They carry us forward.

cards.name: Chronicle of Departures

effects.description: Archive 1 extra card during Succession.
When destroyed, add 2 Echoes cards from the Vault to the World Deck.

cards.flavorText: Every ending is an entry. Every entry, an ending.

cards.name: Hull Breach
cards.flavorText: The void doesn't knock. It just comes in.

cards.name: System Corruption
cards.flavorText: Error. Error. Error. The logs are full of ghosts.

cards.name: Sedition Pamphlet
cards.flavorText: Someone is always listening. Someone is always writing.

cards.name: Emergency Rations
cards.flavorText: Nutrient paste. Day 4,380. Still tastes like hope. Barely.

cards.name: Power Cell
cards.flavorText: A full cell is a promise. An empty one is a prayer.

cards.name: Data Fragment
cards.flavorText: Corrupted. Partial. Still worth more than silence.

cards.name: Crew Morale Boost
cards.flavorText: A song from Earth. No one remembers the words. Everyone hums along.

cards.name: Power Surge

effects.description: Action abilities on structures are disabled.
Gain 2 Energy.
Add 2 Hull Breach junk to your deck.

cards.flavorText: The lights flicker. Then the welders stop.

cards.name: Cargo Infestation

effects.description: All cards in the market cost +1 Matter.
Gain 1 Matter and remove 1 Junk from your deck.
Add 1 Junk to your deck and lose 2 Matter.

cards.flavorText: Something got into the grain stores. Something hungry.

cards.name: Data Corruption Wave

effects.description: Cannot draw extra cards.
Draw 2 cards.
Lose 3 Data.

cards.flavorText: The archives are screaming. No one can read the logs.

cards.name: Black Market Ring

effects.description: All market purchases cost +2 of any resource.
Gain 3 Data.
Lose 2 Data and 2 Influence.

cards.flavorText: Everyone knows it exists. No one admits to shopping there.

cards.name: Factional Agitator

effects.description: Market slides 1 extra slot at end of turn.
Gain 2 Influence.
Lose 3 Influence and add 1 Sedition Pamphlet.

cards.flavorText: They don't need weapons. They have words.

cards.name: Memory Plague

effects.description: All tableau cards have -1 effective lifespan.
Extend all tableau card lifespans by 1.
All tier-1 tableau cards lose 2 lifespan.

cards.flavorText: They forget the names first. Then the faces. Then the mission.

cards.name: Structural Fatigue

effects.description: Slotting structures costs +1 Energy.
Gain 2 Matter.
Depower 2 lowest-priority structures.

cards.flavorText: The bulkheads groan. They've been groaning for fifty years.

cards.name: Propaganda Flood

effects.description: Cannot gain Influence from card effects.
Gain 3 Influence.
Dominant faction presence -2 in each sector.

cards.flavorText: Every screen, every speaker. The message changes, but the volume never does.

cards.name: Resource Audit

effects.description: Gain 3 Matter.
Lose 2 Influence.

cards.flavorText: The ledgers don't lie. But they can be rearranged.

cards.name: Emergency Broadcast

effects.description: Draw 3 cards.
Lose 2 Energy. All market cards cost +1 next turn.

cards.flavorText: All channels. All frequencies. Someone is listening.

cards.name: Wildcat Strike

effects.description: Gain 2 Energy and 2 Influence.
Lose 3 Energy. Add 1 Sedition Pamphlet.

cards.flavorText: The corridors go dark. Not from a power failure — from a choice.

cards.name: Ancestral Memory

effects.description: Extend lifespan of 2 tableau cards by 2.
The oldest tableau card dies immediately.

cards.flavorText: The dead speak. The living are finally quiet enough to listen.

cards.name: Harvest Festival

effects.description: Gain 2 Matter and 2 Influence.
Lose 1 Matter per structure in your tableau.

cards.flavorText: For one night, the Habitat smells like Earth.

cards.name: Hull Integrity Scan

effects.description: Remove 2 Junk cards from your mandate deck.
Add 1 Hull Breach junk. Lose 2 Matter.

cards.flavorText: The scan reveals what the crew already knows: the ship is dying.
